reasoning: Without live search tools to verify current Bloomberg Billionaires Index standings as of October 2025, I rely on a historical prior. In the 2022-2024 period, Elon Musk frequently traded the title of world's richest person with Bernard Arnault and Jeff Bezos, driven by the volatility of Tesla (TSLA) stock and the steadily increasing private valuation of SpaceX. Given his consistent presence at #1 or #2 and the historical dominance of his equity portfolio, I assign roughly a 58% probability that he is ranked #1 at the end of December 2025. The 2-month horizon (from the Oct 2025 cutoff) means his position at the cutoff would be highly predictive, but lacking that exact data, a broadly positive base rate based on his historical tenure as #1 is the best estimate.
